{{Quote|Thanks, Dendu. You wasted a shot ''and'' missed the target. The Emperor would be proud.|Sergeant Major Hong mocks Dendu|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Dendu''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who was member of the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was assigned aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']], along with the [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] led by [[Cadet Leader]] [[Kyle Katarn]]. He was a part of the [[Battle of AX-456|battle]] on [[AX-456]].

Late in the mission and already low on [[Blaster power pack/Legends|ammo]], they inspected the comm center, where a small [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droid]] saw the Imperials and squeaked. Dendu tried to shoot it but missed, and [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant major]] [[Hong]] reprimanded Dendu for wasting precious ammo.

Dendu and the others retreated to the base's cafeteria, where Rebel reinforcements [[Death/Legends|killed]] all but six stormtroopers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
